name: ClickHouse Data Analyst
tagline: ClickHouse data analyst skill with supporting analysis and ClickHouse sub-skills
description: Bundles the `data-analyst` skill and its supporting ClickHouse sub-skills. Provides an elicitation-first workflow for answering analytics questions against ClickHouse: connection setup, data dictionary lookup, safe SQL, analysis, plotting, and artifact management, including local file analysis with chDB.
